name: Pomegranate-Eggplant Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large sauté pan, heat oil over high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Add eggplant and cook, stirring, until well seared and quite soft, about 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Reduce heat to medium, add onion and cook, stirring, for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add garlic and cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
5. Add tomato juice and pomegranate molasses; bring just to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat, season with salt and pepper, stir in the mint and pomegranate seeds, and serve hot or cold.
8. This relish will keep, covered and refrigerated, for about 6 days.
Yield: About 4 cups.
